title: Dutch Pilaf with Golden Grains
description: A flavorful and aromatic Indian-inspired pilaf dish made with golden grains and a hint of Dutch spices.
instructions: Heat butter in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add Dutch Spice Blend and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add Golden Grains and cook for 2-3 minutes, stirring frequently.
Add Pilaf and Water. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low and cover.
Simmer for 15-20 minutes or until liquid is absorbed and grains are tender.
Serve hot and garnish with Grassy if desired.
